## Scope check

This package's scope is deliberately narrow: envelope-level AEAD + tiered key management for TypeScript. It is NOT a protocol library, key escrow, KMS wrapper, JOSE library, or file encryption tool. Before submitting, please confirm your request is within scope, or explain why it should expand the scope.

- [ ] My request fits the package's current scope
- [ ] My request would expand the scope (explain why below)
